pr_url.description: PRURL is the pull request URL recorded for the land phase.

commit.description: Commit is the merge commit or landed commit recorded for the land phase.

landed_at.description: LandedAt is the timestamp when the land command recorded merge completion.

completed_at.description: CompletedAt is the timestamp when land cleanup completed.

LandState.description: LandState records the current land state in the local state file.

execution_started_at.description: ExecutionStartedAt is the execution-start timestamp for the plan.

revision.description: Revision is the current plan-local revision number.

reopen.description: Reopen records the active reopen repair state when one exists.

active_review_round.description: ActiveReviewRound records the current active review round when review is in flight.

land.description: Land records the current land state when merge cleanup is in flight.

LocalStateFile.description: LocalStateFile is the plan-local runtime control artifact under `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/state.json`.

mode.description: Mode is the active reopen mode.

base_step_count.description: BaseStepCount is the number of plan steps that existed before the reopen.

ReopenState.description: ReopenState records the active reopen repair state.

round_id.description: RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round.

kind.description: Kind is the review kind for the round.

step.description: Step is the tracked plan step number when the round is step-scoped.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the round.

aggregated.description: Aggregated reports whether the round has already been aggregated.

decision.description: Decision is the aggregate review decision when one is known.

ReviewRoundState.description: ReviewRoundState records the current active review round in the local state file.
